text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The DOI/URL (S0021929024005189) resolves to a real paper in the Journal of Biomechanics, but its actual title is "LiDAR-based scaling of OpenSim musculoskeletal human models is a viable alternative to marker-based approaches — A preliminary study," authored by Grace McConnochie, Aaron Fox, Clint Bellenger, and Dominic Thewlis. The cited title ("…is accurate and efficient—a validation study using 3d body scanning") and cited author "Zoran Vasic et al." do not match the real paper on this URL in any way.
LINK: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39706029/
